classical
  have hx : x - 1 ≠ 0 := sub_ne_zero.mpr h₀.1
  have hy : y - 1 ≠ 0 := sub_ne_zero.mpr h₀.2.1
  have hz : z - 1 ≠ 0 := sub_ne_zero.mpr h₀.2.2

  have hx1 : (x - 1) ^ 2 ≠ 0 := by
    simpa [pow_two] using mul_ne_zero hx hx
  have hy1 : (y - 1) ^ 2 ≠ 0 := by
    simpa [pow_two] using mul_ne_zero hy hy
  have hz1 : (z - 1) ^ 2 ≠ 0 := by
    simpa [pow_two] using mul_ne_zero hz hz

  -- Reduce to Cauchy-Schwarz: (∑ (x/(x-1))^2) ≥ ( (∑ x/(x-1))^2 ) / 3
  have hcs :
      x ^ 2 / (x - 1) ^ 2 + y ^ 2 / (y - 1) ^ 2 + z ^ 2 / (z - 1) ^ 2 ≥
        (x / (x - 1) + y / (y - 1) + z / (z - 1)) ^ 2 / 3 := by
    -- Use inequality (a^2+b^2+c^2) ≥ (a+b+c)^2/3
    set a : ℝ := x / (x - 1)
    set b : ℝ := y / (y - 1)
    set c : ℝ := z / (z - 1)
    have : a ^ 2 + b ^ 2 + c ^ 2 ≥ (a + b + c) ^ 2 / 3 := by
      -- (a-b)^2+(b-c)^2+(c-a)^2 ≥ 0
      have hnonneg : 0 ≤ (a - b) ^ 2 + (b - c) ^ 2 + (c - a) ^ 2 := by
        nlinarith
      -- Expand gives 2*(a^2+b^2+c^2 - ab - bc - ca) ≥ 0
      -- Hence a^2+b^2+c^2 ≥ ab+bc+ca
      have habc : a ^ 2 + b ^ 2 + c ^ 2 ≥ a * b + b * c + c * a := by
        nlinarith [hnonneg]
      -- Then 3*(a^2+b^2+c^2) ≥ (a+b+c)^2
      nlinarith [habc]
    -- Rewrite back
    simpa [a, b, c, div_pow, pow_two, hx1, hy1, hz1, add_assoc, add_left_comm, add_comm,
      mul_assoc, mul_left_comm, mul_comm, sub_eq_add_neg, add_mul, mul_add, div_eq_mul_inv] using this

  -- It remains to show (x/(x-1)+y/(y-1)+z/(z-1))^2 ≥ 3
  have hsum : x / (x - 1) + y / (y - 1) + z / (z - 1) = 3 + (1 / (x - 1) + 1 / (y - 1) + 1 / (z - 1)) := by
    field_simp [hx, hy, hz]
    ring
  have hprod : (x - 1) * (y - 1) * (z - 1) = x * y * z - (x * y + y * z + z * x) + (x + y + z) - 1 := by
    ring
  have haux :
      1 / (x - 1) + 1 / (y - 1) + 1 / (z - 1) = (x * y + y * z + z * x - (x + y + z)) / ((x - 1) * (y - 1) * (z - 1)) := by
    field_simp [hx, hy, hz]
    ring
  have hden : (x - 1) * (y - 1) * (z - 1) ≠ 0 := by
    exact mul_ne_zero (mul_ne_zero hx hy) hz
  have hiden :
      1 / (x - 1) + 1 / (y - 1) + 1 / (z - 1) = 1 := by
    -- From xyz=1 one gets: (x-1)(y-1)(z-1) = xy+yz+zx - x - y - z
    have hfact :
        (x - 1) * (y - 1) * (z - 1) = x * y + y * z + z * x - (x + y + z) := by
      have : x * y * z = 1 := h₁
      -- Use ring expansion and substitute xyz=1
      have := hprod (x := x) (y := y) (z := z)
      -- simplify with xyz=1
      nlinarith [this, h₁]
    -- Now compute the sum of reciprocals
    have := haux (x := x) (y := y) (z := z)
    -- replace denominator by numerator
    have hnz : x * y + y * z + z * x - (x + y + z) ≠ 0 := by
      -- follows from hfact and nonzero denominator
      exact by
        intro hzero
        have : (x - 1) * (y - 1) * (z - 1) = 0 := by simpa [hfact, hzero]
        exact hden this
    -- conclude
    calc
      1 / (x - 1) + 1 / (y - 1) + 1 / (z - 1)
          = (x * y + y * z + z * x - (x + y + z)) / ((x - 1) * (y - 1) * (z - 1)) := by simpa using this
      _ = (x * y + y * z + z * x - (x + y + z)) / (x * y + y * z + z * x - (x + y + z)) := by
            simp [hfact]
      _ = 1 := by field_simp [hnz]
  have hsum3 : x / (x - 1) + y / (y - 1) + z / (z - 1) = 4 := by
    have := congrArg (fun t => 3 + t) hiden
    -- use decomposition
    nlinarith [hsum, hiden]
  have hsq : (x / (x - 1) + y / (y - 1) + z / (z - 1)) ^ 2 / 3 ≥ 1 := by
    -- since sum = 4, left side = 16/3 ≥ 1
    nlinarith [hsum3]

  have : x ^ 2 / (x - 1) ^ 2 + y ^ 2 / (y - 1) ^ 2 + z ^ 2 / (z - 1) ^ 2 ≥
      (x / (x - 1) + y / (y - 1) + z / (z - 1)) ^ 2 / 3 := hcs
  nlinarith [this, hsq]

  have hy' : (y - 1) ^ 2 ≠ 0 := by

    simpa using pow_ne_zero 2 hz
  have hx' : x ^ 2 / (x - 1) ^ 2 = (x / (x - 1)) ^ 2 := by
    field_simp [hx2]
    ring
  have hy' : y ^ 2 / (y - 1) ^ 2 = (y / (y - 1)) ^ 2 := by
    field_simp [hy2]
    ring
  have hz' : z ^ 2 / (z - 1) ^ 2 = (z / (z - 1)) ^ 2 := by
    field_simp [hz2]
    ring
  have hxyz' :
      (x / (x - 1)) * (y / (y - 1)) * (z / (z - 1)) =

  have habs :
      |(x / (x - 1)) * (y / (y - 1)) * (z / (z - 1))| =

  have hAMGM :
      (x / (x - 1)) ^ 2 + (y / (y - 1)) ^ 2 + (z / (z - 1)) ^ 2 ≥
        (3 : ℝ) * |(x / (x - 1)) * (y / (y - 1)) * (z / (z - 1))| ^ (2 / 3 : ℝ) := by
    simpa [mul_assoc, add_assoc, add_left_comm, add_comm] using
      (geom_mean_le_arith_mean3_sq (x / (x - 1)) (y / (y - 1)) (z / (z - 1)))
  have hprod : |(x / (x - 1)) * (y / (y - 1)) * (z / (z - 1))| ^ (2 / 3 : ℝ) ≥ (1 / 3 : ℝ) := by

        have : (x - 1) = 0 ∨ (y - 1) = 0 ∨ (z - 1) = 0 := by

            simpa [mul_assoc] using mul_eq_zero.mp h
          cases this with

              cases this with

    have hfrac :

    have : |(x / (x - 1)) * (y / (y - 1)) * (z / (z - 1))| =

      simpa using this
    have hpos : 0 < |(x - 1) * (y - 1) * (z - 1)| := by

    have hbound : 1 / |(x - 1) * (y - 1) * (z - 1)| ^ (2 / 3 : ℝ) ≥ (1 / 3 : ℝ) := by

    have : (1 / |(x - 1) * (y - 1) * (z - 1)|) ^ (2 / 3 : ℝ) =

      simp [Real.rpow_neg_one, Real.rpow_mul, Real.rpow_nat_cast, div_eq_mul_inv, mul_assoc]

  have :

have hx : (x - 1) ^ 2 ≠ 0 := by
    have : x - 1 ≠ 0 := sub_ne_zero.2 h₀.1
    nlinarith
  have hy : (y - 1) ^ 2 ≠ 0 := by
    have : y - 1 ≠ 0 := sub_ne_zero.2 h₀.2.1
    nlinarith
  have hz : (z - 1) ^ 2 ≠ 0 := by
    have : z - 1 ≠ 0 := sub_ne_zero.2 h₀.2.2
    nlinarith
  have hx' : (x - 1) ≠ 0 := sub_ne_zero.2 h₀.1
  have hy' : (y - 1) ≠ 0 := sub_ne_zero.2 h₀.2.1
  have hz' : (z - 1) ≠ 0 := sub_ne_zero.2 h₀.2.2
  have hxyz : x * y * z ≠ 0 := by
    have : (1 : ℝ) ≠ 0 := one_ne_zero
    exact (ne_of_eq_of_ne h₁ this).symm
  have hx0 : x ≠ 0 := by
    intro hx0
    have : x * y * z = 0 := by simpa [hx0]
    exact hxyz (this.trans h₁)
  have hy0 : y ≠ 0 := by
    intro hy0
    have : x * y * z = 0 := by simpa [hy0, mul_assoc]
    exact hxyz (this.trans h₁)
  have hz0 : z ≠ 0 := by
    intro hz0
    have : x * y * z = 0 := by simpa [hz0, mul_assoc]
    exact hxyz (this.trans h₁)
  have hposx : 0 < (x - 1) ^ 2 := by
    have : x - 1 ≠ 0 := hx'
    nlinarith
  have hposy : 0 < (y - 1) ^ 2 := by
    have : y - 1 ≠ 0 := hy'
    nlinarith
  have hposz : 0 < (z - 1) ^ 2 := by
    have : z - 1 ≠ 0 := hz'
    nlinarith
  have hAMGM :
      (x ^ 2 / (x - 1) ^ 2 + y ^ 2 / (y - 1) ^ 2 + z ^ 2 / (z - 1) ^ 2) / 3 ≥
        ((x ^ 2 / (x - 1) ^ 2) * (y ^ 2 / (y - 1) ^ 2) * (z ^ 2 / (z - 1) ^ 2)) ^ (1 / 3 : ℝ) := by
    have hxnn : 0 ≤ x ^ 2 / (x - 1) ^ 2 := by
      have : 0 ≤ x ^ 2 := sq_nonneg x
      have : 0 < (x - 1) ^ 2 := hposx
      exact div_nonneg (sq_nonneg x) (le_of_lt this)
    have hyn : 0 ≤ y ^ 2 / (y - 1) ^ 2 := by
      have : 0 < (y - 1) ^ 2 := hposy
      exact div_nonneg (sq_nonneg y) (le_of_lt this)

    simpa [add_assoc, add_left_comm, add_comm, one_div] using

  have hprod :
      ((x ^ 2 / (x - 1) ^ 2) * (y ^ 2 / (y - 1) ^ 2) * (z ^ 2 / (z - 1) ^ 2)) ^ (1 / 3 : ℝ) ≥

    have : (x ^ 2 / (x - 1) ^ 2) * (y ^ 2 / (y - 1) ^ 2) * (z ^ 2 / (z - 1) ^ 2) =

      field_simp [hx, hy, hz, mul_assoc, mul_left_comm, mul_comm, pow_two, sub_eq_add_neg]
      ring
    have hxpos : 0 < (x - 1) ^ 2 := hposx
    have hypos : 0 < (y - 1) ^ 2 := hposy
    have hzpos : 0 < (z - 1) ^ 2 := hposz
    have hdenpos : 0 < (x - 1) ^ 2 * (y - 1) ^ 2 * (z - 1) ^ 2 := by

    have hbasepos :

      have hxnn : 0 ≤ x ^ 2 / (x - 1) ^ 2 := by
        exact div_nonneg (sq_nonneg x) (le_of_lt hposx)
      have hyn : 0 ≤ y ^ 2 / (y - 1) ^ 2 := by
        exact div_nonneg (sq_nonneg y) (le_of_lt hposy)
      have hzn : 0 ≤ z ^ 2 / (z - 1) ^ 2 := by
        exact div_nonneg (sq_nonneg z) (le_of_lt hposz)
      nlinarith [hxnn, hyn, hzn]
    have : ((x ^ 2 / (x - 1) ^ 2) * (y ^ 2 / (y - 1) ^ 2) * (z ^ 2 / (z - 1) ^ 2)) ^ (1 / 3 : ℝ) ≥

    have : ((1 : ℝ) / ((x - 1) ^ 2 * (y - 1) ^ 2 * (z - 1) ^ 2)) ^ (1 / 3 : ℝ) ≥ (1 / 3 : ℝ) := by
      have : (1 : ℝ) / ((x - 1) ^ 2 * (y - 1) ^ 2 * (z - 1) ^ 2) ≥ (1 / 27 : ℝ) := by

        have : (1 : ℝ) / ((x - 1) ^ 2 * (y - 1) ^ 2 * (z - 1) ^ 2) ≥ 1 / 27 := by

          simpa [one_div] using this
        exact this
      have hnonneg : 0 ≤ (1 : ℝ) / ((x - 1) ^ 2 * (y - 1) ^ 2 * (z - 1) ^ 2) := by
